source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
a-sa'-fi-oth (Codex Alexandrinus, Asaphphioth; Codex Vaticanus, Assapheioth; the King James Version Azaphion): The head of a family, which returned with Zerubbabel from captivity, called also the servants of Solomon (1 Esdras 5:33). Probably the same as Hassophereth of Ezr 2:55 and Sophereth of Ne 7:57.
